# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "2.1"
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
  - name: key-auth
    service: default-service
    route: default-route
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100
      second: 10
global:
  plugins:
    - name: cors
      config:
        origins:
          - "*"
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        headers:
          - Content-Type
          - Authorization
services:
  - name: default-service
    url: http://backend-service
    routes:
      - name: default-route
        paths:
          - /
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - api-key
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 100
              second: 10
